## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds locally — firmware (`pio run`), host tests (`ctest`), and/or sim as relevant
- [ ] `cppcheck` is clean (for firmware changes)
- [ ] **UI change?** Re-seeded the affected visual baselines (incl. per-language) in this PR
- [ ] **i18n change?** All five languages updated; `scripts/validate_i18n.py` passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible change
- [ ] No secrets / credentials added to the repo or `config.h`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything tricky, trade-offs made, or follow-ups intentionally left out. -->
